  - id: ofj6

---
One can allocate arrays by providing the list of their elements in square brackets:
e.g., `new int[0]` creates an array of `int`s with one element: the value 0;
`new int[2, 3]` creates an array of `int`s with two elements: the values 2 and 3.

frontmatter.shortDescription: Array initializers list the elements in square brackets
frontmatter.shortCorrection: Array initializers list the elements in curly braces
